entries.speaker: edren
lines: Cael. Put it down.

entries.speaker: cael
lines: I can't do that.

entries.speaker: lira
lines: What are you doing?

entries.speaker: cael
lines: I'm ending this. The Pendulum isn't a weapon and it
isn't a cage. It's a key. And I know how to use it.

entries.speaker: maren
lines: The Pallor is using you. Whatever it promised—

entries.speaker: cael
lines: It didn't promise anything. It showed me.

entries.speaker: cael
lines: Cycle after cycle, age after age — someone finds this
thing, someone opens the door, and someone pays the price to
close it.

entries.speaker: cael
lines: Every time, the world forgets. Every time, it happens
again.

entries.speaker: cael
lines: I'm going to break the cycle. Not close the door —
destroy it.

entries.speaker: cael
lines: The machine at the Convergence can channel enough
Pallor energy to shatter the connection permanently. No more
door. No more cycles. No more cost.

entries.speaker: edren
lines: You don't know that. You're listening to something
that wants you to believe—

entries.speaker: cael
lines: I'm listening to the only thing that's telling me the
truth. The rest of you are too afraid to hear it.

entries.speaker: cael
lines: I'm doing this for you. For everyone.

entries.speaker: lira
lines: Last night. In the workshop. You were saying goodbye.

entries.speaker: cael
lines: I was trying not to.

entries.speaker: lira
lines: Cael. Please. Stay.

entries.speaker: cael
lines: I love you. I loved you in the workshop and I loved
you on the castle walls and I love you now. That's why I can't.

entries.speaker: lira
lines: Cael. Please. Stay.

entries.speaker: cael
lines: I love you. That's why I can't.
